title: Standard font
author: timh1004
body: It seems the standard font size is Calibri 11pt when creating a workbook. Is there a way to set another font for the whole worksheet or even workbook? Setting the font for each row, column or even each cell is not very comfortable.

comments.author: JMStudiosJoe
comments.body: +1 agreed and having an error pop up in numbers and excel about the missing default font for all empty cells which ` sheet.eachRow(row => { row.eachCell({ includeEmpty: true }, cell => { ` Is not setting the font of every cell.
